creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to ek from comment #31)
1. DISTVERSION is wrong you have to use DISTVERSIONPREFIX
2. Check the ports with portclippy/portfmt/portlint -abct
3. You don't need those OPTIONS DESC they are defined by default
4. Use OPTIONSNG instead of the conditionals
5. Use dynamic plist rather than static large pkg-plist. Check one of those tex or gitlab ports.
